---
title: "presentation prep"
author: "Keith Howen"
date: "2025-10-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Imports
```{r}
library(here)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggspatial)
library(prettymapr)
library(dplyr)

```

```{r}
list.files(here("data"))
```

# Read datasets with geospatial coordinates

```{r}
TCC_developing_12h = read.csv(here("data", "TCC_developing_12h.csv"))
TCC_nondeveloping = read.csv(here("data", "TCC_non_developing.csv"))
```


```{r}
TCC_nondeveloping
```

```{r}
TCC_developing_12h
```


# Raw plot
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = TCC_nondeveloping,
             aes(x = lon, y = lat),
             color = "grey60", alpha = 0.4, size = 0.7) +
  geom_point(data = TCC_developing_12h,
             aes(x = lon, y = lat),
             color = "red", alpha = 0.7, size = 0.8) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(-180, 180), ylim = c(-40, 40)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude",
       title = "Locations of Tropical Cloud Centers Around Global Basins",
       subtitle = "Red = Developing systems, Grey = Non-developing systems")

```



# Prep dataset for geoplotting
```{r}
# optional: wrap 180/-180 seam
wrap_lon <- function(x){
  x <- ifelse(x > 180, x - 360, x)
  x <- ifelse(x <= -180, x + 360, x)
  ifelse(abs(x - 180) < 1e-9, 179.999, x)
}
TCC_developing_12h$lon  <- wrap_lon(TCC_developing_12h$lon)
TCC_nondeveloping$lon   <- wrap_lon(TCC_nondeveloping$lon)

# (Optional) downsample non-developing to reduce overplot
set.seed(1)
nondev_bg <- if (nrow(TCC_nondeveloping) > 15000)
  TCC_nondeveloping[sample(nrow(TCC_nondeveloping), 15000), ] else TCC_nondeveloping


```


# Plot +  basemap 

## Function

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# helper: wrap 180/-180 seam (leave as-is if already wrapped)
wrap_lon <- function(x){
  x <- ifelse(x > 180, x - 360, x)
  x <- ifelse(x <= -180, x + 360, x)
  ifelse(abs(x - 180) < 1e-9, 179.999, x)
}

# small helper to conditionally add a layer
add_if <- function(cond, layer) if (cond) layer else NULL

#' Plot Tropical Cloud Centers (TCCs)
#'
#' @param dev_df          data.frame of developing TCCs with columns lon, lat
#' @param nondev_df       data.frame of non-developing TCCs with columns lon, lat
#' @param show            "both", "dev", or "nondev"
#' @param dev_geom        "points", "density", "both", or "none"
#' @param nondev_geom     "points", "density", "both", or "none"
#' @param alpha_pts_dev   point opacity for developing
#' @param alpha_pts_non   point opacity for non-developing
#' @param alpha_den_dev   density opacity for developing
#' @param alpha_den_non   density opacity for non-developing
#' @param size_pts_dev    point size for developing
#' @param size_pts_non    point size for non-developing
#' @param bins_den        number of density bins (contours)
#' @param col_dev         point colour for developing
#' @param col_non         point colour for non-developing
#' @param fill_den_dev    2-col vector c(low, high) for dev density fill
#' @param fill_den_non    2-col vector c(low, high) for nondev density fill
#' @param sample_non      optional integer; if set, downsample non-developing points
#' @param xlim_deg, ylim_deg axis limits in degrees
#' @param draw_coast      TRUE to draw coastlines
#'
plot_tcc <- function(
  dev_df, nondev_df,
  show = c("both","dev","nondev"),
  dev_geom = c("both","points","density","none"),
  nondev_geom = c("points","density","both","none"),
  alpha_pts_dev = 0.85, alpha_pts_non = 0.15,
  alpha_den_dev = 0.18, alpha_den_non = 0.10,
  size_pts_dev  = 0.8,  size_pts_non  = 0.6,
  bins_den = 30,
  col_dev = "red3", col_non = "darkblue",
  fill_den_dev = c("white","red3"),
  fill_den_non = c("white","darkblue"),
  sample_non = NULL,
  xlim_deg = c(-180, 180),
  ylim_deg = c(-100, 100),
  draw_coast = TRUE,
  coast_outline_size=0.45,
  title = "Tropical Cloud Center (TCC) Locations from 1982-2010",
  subtitle = "Tuned by show/geom/alpha knobs (points and/or densities for each class)"
){
  # match args
  show        <- match.arg(show)
  dev_geom    <- match.arg(dev_geom)
  nondev_geom <- match.arg(nondev_geom)

  # wrap longitudes (safe if already wrapped)
  if (!is.null(dev_df) && nrow(dev_df))  dev_df$lon   <- wrap_lon(dev_df$lon)
  if (!is.null(nondev_df) && nrow(nondev_df)) nondev_df$lon <- wrap_lon(nondev_df$lon)

  # optional downsample for non-developing
  if (!is.null(sample_non) && !is.null(nondev_df) && nrow(nondev_df) > sample_non) {
    set.seed(1)
    nondev_df <- nondev_df %>% slice_sample(n = sample_non)
  }

  # which groups to show
  show_dev    <- show %in% c("both","dev")     && !is.null(dev_df)    && nrow(dev_df)    > 0
  show_nondev <- show %in% c("both","nondev")  && !is.null(nondev_df) && nrow(nondev_df) > 0

  p <- ggplot() +
    theme_void() +
    coord_fixed(xlim = xlim_deg, ylim = ylim_deg, expand = FALSE) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 23, hjust = 0),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0)
    )

    # coastlines under everything
  p <- p + add_if(draw_coast, borders("world", colour = "black", fill = NA, size = coast_outline_size))

  # --- NON-DEVELOPING layers (usually faint background) ---
  # density first (backdrop), then points — so points sit on top
  if (show_nondev && nondev_geom %in% c("density","both")) {
    p <- p +
      stat_density_2d(
        data = nondev_df,
        aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = after_stat(level)),
        geom = "polygon", colour = NA, bins = bins_den, alpha = alpha_den_non
      ) +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = fill_den_non[1], high = fill_den_non[2])
  }
  if (show_nondev && nondev_geom %in% c("points","both")) {
    p <- p +
      geom_point(
        data = nondev_df,
        aes(lon, lat),
        size = size_pts_non, alpha = alpha_pts_non, color = col_non
      )
  }

  # --- DEVELOPING layers (foreground) ---
  if (show_dev && dev_geom %in% c("density","both")) {
    p <- p +
      stat_density_2d(
        data = dev_df,
        aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = after_stat(level)),
        geom = "polygon", colour = NA, bins = bins_den, alpha = alpha_den_dev
      ) +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = fill_den_dev[1], high = fill_den_dev[2])
  }
  if (show_dev && dev_geom %in% c("points","both")) {
    p <- p +
      geom_point(
        data = dev_df,
        aes(lon, lat),
        size = size_pts_dev, alpha = alpha_pts_dev, color = col_dev
      )
  }

  p + labs(
    title    = title,
    subtitle = subtitle,
    caption = "Data: Wijnands, Qian & Kuleshov (2016), Mon. Wea. Rev. 144(12):4605–4619"
  ) + 
theme(
  plot.caption = element_text(size = 9.5, colour = "grey30", hjust = 0),
  plot.caption.position = "plot",     # puts caption below panel
  plot.margin = margin(6, 10, 12, 10) # add a bit of bottom space
)
}

```

## [FINAL PLOT USED!] 1. Both dev and non-dev, points only 

```{r}
# 1) Both classes, points only
ops_translation = 0.2
p=plot_tcc(TCC_developing_12h, TCC_nondeveloping,
         show="both", dev_geom="points", nondev_geom="points",
         alpha_pts_dev=0.37+ops_translation, alpha_pts_non=0.12+ops_translation,
         sample_non=15000, coast_outline_size = 1.3,
         col_non='blue3',
         subtitle=sprintf("%d developing TCCs (red), %d non-developing TCCs (blue).",
                          nrow(TCC_developing_12h), nrow(TCC_nondeveloping)),
         title = sprintf("%d Tropical Cloud Center (TCC) Locations from 1982-2010",
                         nrow(TCC_developing_12h) + nrow(TCC_nondeveloping))
)

p




ggsave(here("output", "tc_intro_and_challenge_plots", "tcc_map.png"),
       p, width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150, bg = "white")

```

```{r}
list.files(here("output", "tc_intro_and_challenge_plots"))
```




## 2. Developing: density + points; Non-developing: points only (faint)

```{r}
# 2) Developing: density + points; Non-developing: points only (faint)
plot_tcc(TCC_developing_12h,
         TCC_nondeveloping,
         show="both", dev_geom="both", nondev_geom="both",
         alpha_den_dev=.8, alpha_pts_dev=.75, alpha_pts_non=.10, sample_non=12000, alpha_den_non=0.3)
```
## 3. Developing only, density heatmap

```{r}
# 3) Developing only, density heatmap
plot_tcc(TCC_developing_12h, NULL,
         show="dev",
         dev_geom="density",
         fill_den_dev=c("white","red3"),
         alpha_den_dev=0.05,
         bins_den=55)
```

## 4. Non-developing only, density + points (monochrome)

```{r}
# 4) Non-developing only, density + points (monochrome)
plot_tcc(NULL, TCC_nondeveloping,
         show="nondev", nondev_geom="both",
         col_non="grey20", fill_den_non=c("white","grey50"), alpha_pts_non=.15)
```

## Self try
```{r}
# 3) Developing only, density heatmap
plot_tcc(TCC_developing_12h, NULL,
         show="dev",
         dev_geom="both",
         fill_den_dev=c("white","red3"),
         alpha_pts_dev=0.2,
         alpha_den_dev=0.07,
         bins_den=65,
         coast_outline_size = 1,
         subtitle=sprintf("%d TCCs that develop into a TC.", nrow(TCC_developing_12h)))
```

```{r}
# 3) Non-Developing only, density heatmap
plot_tcc(NULL, TCC_nondeveloping,
         show="nondev",
         nondev_geom="density",
         fill_den_non=c("white","darkblue"),
         alpha_den_non=0.15,
         bins_den=35)
```


```{r}

SNR_demo = function(beta){
  
  x=seq(-4,4,0.05)
  
}
```
